settings.title: The Future of Work in Engineering & Architecture Survey 2025

settings.editor: The AEC industry is evolving rapidly, and your voice matters more than ever. By participating in our Future of Work Survey, you’re not just sharing your experiences—you’re helping to uncover trends, drive meaningful change, and craft solutions that will define the future of our industry.

settings.title: Insights from the Future of Work in Engineering and Architecture Report

settings.editor:
• The Freelance Revolution: A whopping 68% of early-career professionals are eyeing freelance careers—a staggering threefold surge since 2021!
  • Flexibility is Non-Negotiable: An overwhelming 87% of AEC professionals rank workplace flexibility as a must-have for career satisfaction.
  • The Turnover Tidal Wave: A striking 92% of respondents are ready to jump ship for better opportunities—how will your firm rise to the challenge?
Participate in our survey before [Closing Date: Insert Date Here].

By participating, you:

  • Shape impactful strategies to tackle the industry's biggest challenges.
  • Offer invaluable insights to drive meaningful workplace transformations.
  • Be a catalyst in building innovative solutions for a stronger, more resilient AEC industry.

settings.description_text: "Participating in the survey gave me a chance to share my perspective and see how my experiences aligned with others in the industry."

settings.editor:
Don’t miss your chance to influence the future of the AEC industry.
The survey closes on [Insert Date Here].
